reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve the accuracy of my answers for all future questions. I have 1 SP available and this is a high-value skill to secure early.
Unlocking pe_plan will provide a structured planning phase and a reflection step, which are crucial for maintaining accuracy as question difficulty increases, especially for Level 3 challenges.
I have 1 SP and pe_reflect is a powerful skill that provides a dedicated reflection call to catch errors, which is crucial as question difficulty increases.
